ab: Miqumisang, Maaq su balivun tu?
en: A: Hello, what do you want to buy?

ab: Na baliv aak Kupu.
en: B: I want to buy a cup.

ab: Miqumisang, Maaq su balivun?
en: A: Hello, what do you want to buy?

ab: Na mabaliv aak tas-a Tamuhung.
en: B: I want to buy a hat.

ab: Na mabaliv aak Kupu, Haiza muu babalivun?
ch: A:我要買杯子，你們有賣嗎?
en: A: I want to buy a cup, do you sell them?

ab: Haiza, Na piaq suu balivun?
en: B: Yes, how many do you want to buy?

ab: Haiza muu babalivun Saviki?
en: A: Do you sell betel nut?

ab: Uka, Uka nam babalivun Saviki.
en: B: No, we don't sell betel nut.

ab: Na mabaliv aak Tilas.
en: A: I want to buy rice.

ab: Na piaq suu qalup tilas balivun?
en: B: How many packs do you want to buy?

ab: Saving tau Qalup.
en: A: Give me three packs.

ab: Na mabaliv aak Hutan.
en: A: I want to buy sweet potatoes.

ab: Aminun in hutan isbaliv.
en: B: All the sweet potatoes are sold out.

ab: Na mabaliv aak dusa paan Avula.
en: A: I want to buy two bottles of oil.

ab: Musqa in nam midutda tas-a paan.
en: B: We only have one bottle left.

ab: Dangazing mabaliv Nibuh.
en: A: Go buy me eggs.

ab: Piaq suu tingting na balivun?
en: B: How many catties do you want to buy?

ab: Piaq suu tingting na balivun Nibuh?
en: A: How many pounds of eggs do you want to buy?

ab: Na dusa tingting nak balivun.
en: B: I want to buy two catties.

ab: Na mabaliv aak dusa linuqus Saluh.
en: A: I want to buy two green onions.

ab: Haizang dii minutda tau linuqus, Amini paisuu.
en: B: There are three left, all for you!

ab: Tasqalup dii ka tilas piaq sui?
en: A: How much is this bag of rice?

ab: Tasqalup a dusa saba sui.
en: B: $200 for a pack.

ab: Muskun mapusa qan tas-a sui, Sipulun a lusqa’un mapusan sui.
en: A:The total is $21, just count $20.

ab: Uninang.
en: B: Thank you.

ab: Haiza dii masivaun qan hima sui.
en: A: Here's $95.

ab: Na muqna aak mabaliv tu tikis, Susan puskunun min tas-a sabah.
en: B: I'll buy some more, and make up 100 yuan.

ab: Muskunun himasaba tu mas-an a sui.
en: A:All $510.

ab: Sipulun inak sui azuq hima saba?
en: B: Count me in for $500, okay?

ab: Maqlis aipi saa, Maqtu vanaqan masipul tu tikis?
ch: A:這個太貴了，可以算便宜一點嗎?
en: A: It's too expensive, can you make it cheaper?

ab: Nii tu maqtu, Nii in aipi tu maqlis.
ch: B:不行，這個已經很便宜了。
en: B: No, this is already very cheap.

ab: Na mabaliv aak hindii hima qalup tu satuu’
en: A: I want this packet of candy.

ab: Hindii satuu’ matiun sui, Duu na haizang duma na sizaun?
ch: B:這糖30元，還需要別的東西嗎?
en: B: $30 for this candy, need anything else?
